chin_hakha.conversion_factor_ratio_equal_to_1_e_g: Conversion factor = ratio 1 he a i tluk (tahchunhnak, 1 ft = 12 in → 12 in / 1 ft). Mah he na pun ahcun unit a thleng, value cu a thleng lo. SI prefixes (kilo, milli) cu powers of 10 an si — decimal lawng thlengter.
chin_hakha.length_mass_volume_temperature_time_en: A saunak, mass, volume, temperature, caan, energy, pressure. Rule pakhat a biapimi: step paoh ah units zulh. Na answer a dihnak cu seconds na duh nain m² ah a si ahcun, a cunglei ah khoika hmanhah error na tuah cang.
chin_hakha.daily_life_conversions_f_c_mph_km_h_lb: Nifate nunnak conversions (°F↔°C, mph↔km/h, lb↔kg) le AP / SAT / lab measurements. Biahalnak pakhat cio nih na leh hnu ah conversion factor a langhter, cucaah muscle memory na ser khawh.
chin_hakha.real_world_unit_conversion_scenarios_g: Real-world unit-conversion scenarios: gas mileage, recipe scaling, dosage calculations, travel-distance estimates. Word problems cu 80% reading comprehension + 20% conversion math a si.
chin_hakha.every_si_prefix_is_a_power_of_10_slide: SI prefix pakhat cio cu power of 10 a si. Source le target exponents kha slide in scales cu zeitluk in an i hlat kha thei — scientific notation le Fermi estimates a hnungah skill a biapi bik.
chin_hakha.test_your_unit_conversion_knowledge: Na unit conversion hngalhnak kha zoh!
chin_hakha.question: 🧠 Biahalnak
chin_hakha.click_generate_for_an_ai_crafted_word_: AI nih a sermi word problem caah Generate click
chin_hakha.2_orders_of_magnitude_close_cousins_cm: <2 orders of magnitude — unau a naih (cm→m).
chin_hakha.adjust_source_and_target_exponents_10_: Source le target exponents (10^N) remh. Widget nih magnitude change kha bands 5 a phundang ah a chiah. Score a um lo, reveal a um lo.
chin_hakha.hypothesis_what_real_world_examples_sp: Hypothesis: Real-world examples zeihmi nih magnitude band pakhat cio a phanh?
chin_hakha.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ka dinh — prompts a onghmi langhter
chin_hakha.compare_cm_km_mm_light_year_how_many_o: Cm→km, mm→light-year khaikhat. OOM zeizat cio?
chin_hakha.why_are_scientists_trained_in_orders_o: Zeicah scientists cu orders of magnitude ah an cawnpiak?
chin_hakha.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Ka hngalh — namah bia in fianter
chin_hakha.explain_why_dimensional_reasoning_acro: OOM tampi chungah dimensional reasoning zeicah a har kha fianter.
chin_hakha.design_note_discrete_5_state_magnitude: Design note: discrete 5-state magnitude marker; error score a um lo; reveal a um lo — by design.
